name: Maysha
birthDayWish: write a peragraph wishing her in 200-244 cherecter
firstMeetExperiance: At first, when I saw that pic, my mind went blank, and I couldn't think of anything else without it. Well I can still recall that feeling as if it was yesterday.
firstDateExperiance: I was sooo nervous. I, and I guess I wasn’t able to enjoy it. Well, I would always remember the scene with the money, though.
favMemory: I like it because my efforts have paid off.  That is my end goal from the beginning. And, this is a pointer that it might work. I'm talking about this year’s Eid.
stillInLoveText: But now I guess you're the one holding  the thin threads. Just so U know, I do love you. But for some reason, suddenly I feel like  there is a wall. I don’t know why.
